<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart-bash-79" location="lines:79-85" -->
```bash
  # Generate Ed25519 private key in PEM format
  openssl genpkey -algorithm ed25519 -out external_party_private.pem

  # Extract raw public key (32 bytes) and convert to hex for API calls
  HEX_PUBLIC_KEY=$(openssl pkey -in external_party_private.pem -pubout -outform DER | tail -c 32 | xxd -p -c 32)
  echo "Hex public key: $HEX_PUBLIC_KEY"

```
